rationale: Fresh validation passes for TASK-087 narrow dependency-direction guard slice. Updated implementation build records source_planning_build and file evidence. The slice adds regression fixture coverage proving source-owned file-structure audit detects forbidden domain-to-application and application-to-adapter imports. It satisfies the TASK-087 acceptance item for dependency checks/tests while leaving broader source migration open. Policy blocks implementation validation until accepted_planning_build_ref:.codewiki/roadmap/queue.json#TASK-087:not-build-ref are recorded.
